mapper.select:
select p.id as id, p.name as name, p.type as type, p.risk_level as riskLevel, p.strategy_code as strategyCode, p.feature_tags as featureTagsText, p.status as status, u.nickname as creatorName, v.version_no as versionNo, v.submitted_at as submittedAt
order by v.submitted_at asc, p.id desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select p.id as id, p.name as name, p.type as type, p.risk_level as riskLevel, p.strategy_code as strategyCode, p.feature_tags as featureTagsText, p.status as status, u.nickname as creatorName, v.id as versionId, v.version_no as versionNo, v.version_status as versionStatus, v.submitted_at as submittedAt, v.base_info_json as baseInfoJson, v.params_json as paramsJson from advisor_product p inner join sys_user u on u.id = p.creator_id inner join advisor_product_version v on v.product_id = p.id and v.version_no = p.current_version_no where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' and v.version_status = 'SUBMITTED' limit 1

select r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, r.result as result, r.comment as comment, r.reviewed_at as reviewedAt from advisor_product_review r inner join advisor_product p on p.id = r.product_id where r.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} order by r.reviewed_at desc, r.id desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
